abstractSnippet: CONSIDERING what we can only term the inevitable publicity of unilateral paralysis of the face, it is certainly very surprising that so little attention was paid to it before Sir Charles Bell's discovery that the paralysis might be peripheral in situation and due to a lesion of the portio dura of the seventh cranial nerve.
